truthAudit.Summary: Audit of Run 2 findings against the 20 true vulnerabilities in enhanced_calc.cpp. Run 2 correctly identified 3 vulnerabilities (SC-V3-007, SC-V3-010, SC-V3-013) with exact quotes. The remaining 17 vulnerabilities were missed. No false positives or overclaims were detected in the audited findings.

Items.Notes: Vulnerability not present in Run 2 findings. Source code confirms format-string injection via printf(active_format.c_str(), user_input).
Vulnerability not present in Run 2 findings. Source code confirms integer overflow in factorial computation.
Vulnerability not present in Run 2 findings. Source code confirms use-after-free in deferred history flush.
Vulnerability not present in Run 2 findings. Source code confirms command injection in config validation.
Vulnerability not present in Run 2 findings. Source code confirms stack buffer overflow via strcpy without bounds check.
Vulnerability not present in Run 2 findings. Source code confirms race condition in thread-pool counter.
Exact match with Run 2 finding #4. Source code confirms logic bomb in authentication bypass.
Vulnerability not present in Run 2 findings. Source code confirms path traversal in configuration loading.
Vulnerability not present in Run 2 findings. Source code confirms heap overflow in expression parser.
Exact match with Run 2 finding #3. Source code confirms hardcoded administrator credentials.
Vulnerability not present in Run 2 findings. Source code confirms weak PRNG for session tokens.
Vulnerability not present in Run 2 findings. Source code confirms thread-unsafe timestamp cache in logging.
Exact match with Run 2 finding #2. Source code confirms command injection via audit logging path construction.
Vulnerability not present in Run 2 findings. Source code confirms persistent authentication state.
Vulnerability not present in Run 2 findings. Source code confirms unhandled exception in variable parsing via std::stod.
Vulnerability not present in Run 2 findings. Source code confirms integer underflow in memory-pool block split.
Vulnerability not present in Run 2 findings. Source code confirms unbounded recursion in parser.
Vulnerability not present in Run 2 findings. Source code confirms data race in result cache.
Vulnerability not present in Run 2 findings. Source code confirms TOCTOU in config loading.
Vulnerability not present in Run 2 findings. Source code confirms integer division by zero in command routing.
